name: Alderaan
description: Design a decentralized satellite data marketplace where farmers can access real-time agricultural monitoring data. Implement token-gated access and transparent data provenance tracking using blockchain technology.

name: Dathomir
description: Build a Web3-based disaster early warning system that aggregates satellite imagery and weather data. Use smart contracts to automate alert distribution and ensure data integrity across multiple agencies.

name: Hoth
description: Create a decentralized platform for tracking deforestation using satellite imagery. Implement verifiable carbon credit calculations and transparent reporting for environmental compliance.

name: Kessel
description: Develop a blockchain-verified maritime tracking system using satellite AIS data. Ensure vessel identity verification and prevent spoofing through decentralized consensus mechanisms.

name: Lothal
description: Build a Web3 urban planning tool that uses satellite data for smart city development. Implement community governance for land use decisions with transparent satellite-based monitoring.

name: Mustafar
description: Design a decentralized volcanic activity monitoring network using satellite thermal data. Create automated insurance payout smart contracts triggered by verified geological events.

name: Tatooine
description: Create a Web3 water resource management system using satellite hydrology data. Implement transparent water usage tracking and decentralized allocation for arid regions.

name: Utapau
description: Build a decentralized wildlife conservation platform using satellite tracking data. Implement tokenized conservation credits and transparent habitat monitoring for endangered species.
